EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - Other Opportunities
EmailTemplate.subject: Seize your next adventure!
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
THE JOURNEY DOESN'T END HERE.
{!Contact.FirstName}, we have some exciting contracts that we think would be a great match for you! If any of the adventures tickles your interest, head over to the Alliance Connect app to find out more and apply.
[List contract jobs here]
If you have any questions at all you can always call our friendly staff on 07 4998 5550.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
